content: The structured iterative self-feedback framework of Self-Refine can be augmented by leveraging the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to resolve a long-standing limitation of single-perspective self-refinement: the risk of the model repeating its own blind spots iteration after iteration. This combination creates a zero-data self-improvement pipeline for LLMs that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no additional training or supervised data, while eliminating the bias of fixed single-perspective feedback.
